description: Abjure Enemy is an Oath of Vengeance Paladin class action. This ability allows them to Frighten an enemy.
Accursed Spectre is a The Hexblade warlock passive feature that raises a spectre when an enemy is killed.
Action Surge is a free action gained by Fighters at Level 2. This ability allows the fighter to take another action in the same turn.

Aid is a level 2 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to heal and embolden their allies and themselves with resolve. Affected creatures have their maximum Hit Points increased for the duration of the spell.
Animate Dead is a level 3 necromancy spell. It allows spellcasters to animate a corpse to create an undead servant.

Arcane Ward is a passive feature of the Abjuration School Wizard. Upon casting an Abjuration spell,[See: Bugs] gain a charge in Arcane Ward which blocks incoming damage. Each time damage is taken, it is reduced by the charge count and the charge count decreases by one.
Armour of Hexes is a The Hexblade warlock passive feature/reaction that nullifies attacks by cursed enemies.
Assassinate: Ambush is an Assassin Rogue passive feature that greatly increases damage against foes you surprise.
Assassinate: Initiative is an Assassin Rogue passive feature that increases the chance of a successful attack if you act before they do.
Assassin's Alacrity is an Assassin Rogue passive feature that greatly enhances your first turn in combat
Aura of Courage is a Paladin class action. This ability allows a Paladin to protect their allies from fear.
Aura of Devotion is a Oath of Devotion paladin class action. This ability allows a paladin to protect their allies from being Charmed.
Aura of Hate is a class action of Oathbreaker paladins. It gives bonus damage to the paladin and any nearby weapon-using fiends or undead.
Aura of Protection is a Paladin class action which improves the Paladin's and all nearby allies' Saving Throws.
Aura of Warding is an Oath of the Ancients paladin class action. This ability allows a paladin to protect their allies from damage from spells.
Bane may refer to: Bane, the deity and member of the Dead Three Bane (Condition), the condition applied by the Bane spell Bane (Spell), the level 1 enchantment spell
Banishing Smite is a level 5 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to imbue their weapon with power, dealing force damage and possibly Banishing the target.

Barkskin is a level 2 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to fortify the defense of a willing creature and increase their Armour Class. While under the effect of this spell, the target's skin has a bark-like texture.
Beacon of Hope is a level 3 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to bolster their allies with hope and vitality.

Bear Companion is a variant of Ranger's Companion which is a Subclass Feature of Rangers learned immediately upon choosing the Beast Master subclass. This ability allows the Beast Master to call upon their animal companion to fight and aid them in combat.
Beguiling Defences is an Archfey Warlock passive feature that makes the Warlock immune to charm.
Bend Luck is both a free action and reaction available to Wild Magic sorcerers that grants a bonus or penalty to a target's attack roll, ability check, or saving throw.

Benign Transposition Teleport is a Conjuration School Wizard class action that you can use to teleport near or swap places with an ally. This ability can be replenished by casting a Conjuration spell or resting.

Bestial Fury is a Beast Master Ranger passive feature that enhances your companions by granting them the ability to make a second attack along with their first attack, similar to the Extra Attack class feature.
Bestow Curse is a level 3 necromancy spell. It allows spellcasters to curse a target with their touch.
Bind Hexed Weapon is a class action available to The Hexblade warlocks that allows them to bind a weapon and apply Hexblade curses.

Blade Flourish is an enhancement to Bardic Inspiration available to College of Swords Bards at Level 3 that provides a series of Weapon Action-like actions that all require a Bardic Inspiration Charge to use. Normal Bardic Inspiration actions are still available to College of Swords Bards.
Blade of Rime is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements Monk to use their equivalent of Ice Knife by expending Ki Points instead of spell slots.
Bladesong is the signature ability of Bladesinging wizards.
Blessed Healer is a Life Domain Cleric passive feature that heals the Cleric whenever it heals someone other than itself for 2 + the spell's level⁠⁠Hit Points.
Blight is a level 4 necromancy spell. It allows spellcasters to drain the moisture and vitality from a target creature using necromantic energy. It is especially effective versus plants.
Blindness is a level 2 necromancy spell. It allows spellcasters to magically Blind a targeted hostile creature.
Blink is a level 3 transmutation spell. It allows the spellcaster to travel to the Ethereal Plane, unassailable and unseen until they return.
Blur is a level 2 illusion spell. It blurs the spellcaster's body, making them harder to hit.

Boar Companion is a variant of Ranger's Companion which is a Subclass Feature of Rangers learned immediately upon choosing the Beast Master subclass. This ability allows the Beast Master to call upon their animal companion to fight and aid them in combat.
Bolstering Magic: Boon is a Wild Magic Barbarian class action. This ability gives bonuses to attack rolls and ability checks for up to a minute, once per long rest.
Bolstering Magic: Level 1 Spell Slot is a Wild Magic Barbarian class action. This ability recovers a level 1 spell slot for you or an ally, once per long rest.
Bolstering Magic: Level 2 Spell Slot is a Wild Magic Barbarian class action. This ability recovers a level 2 spell slot for you or an ally, once per long rest.
Bolstering Magic: Level 3 Spell Slot is a Wild Magic Barbarian class action. This ability recovers a level 3 spell slot for you or an ally, once per long rest.
Bone Chill is a cantrip (Necromancy). It deals ⁠Necrotic damage and prevents the target from regaining Hit Points.
Boot of the Giants is a Giant barbarian class action that allows them to send enemies flying with a swift kick.

Branding Smite is a level 2 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to cause their weapon to gleam with astral radiance, allowing them to mark targets with light, preventing them from turning Invisible.
Brutal Critical is a Barbarian passive feature. The barbarian makes their critical hits even deadlier.
Burning Hands is a level 1 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to shoot a flaming cone from their fingertips and deal ⁠Fire damage to enemies.

Call Lightning is a level 3 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to call down lightning to hit all targets within the area of effect. The spellcaster can also call down lightning repeatedly on subsequent turns.

Calm Emotions is a level 2 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to magically subdue intense emotions in targeted creatures. The affected target becomes neutral to the creatures it was hostile toward. It also cannot be Charmed or Frightened during the duration of the spell.
Champion Challenge is a Channel Oath action available to Oath of the Crown paladins which penalizes the challenged target with Disadvantage on attacks when attacking anyone but the paladin.
Charm Animals and Plants is a class action available to Nature Domain clerics. This ability allows these clerics to reduce the aggressiveness of nearby fauna and flora.
Cheeky Tipple is a Way of the Drunken Master monk passive feature that prevents the effects of being intoxicated.

Chill of the Mountain is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to hit with cold damage and reduce the movement speed of their opponent. This action is the monk's equivalent of Ray of Frost.
Clench of the North Wind is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to cast their equivalent of Hold Person by expending Ki Points instead of spell slots.
Cloak of Shadows is a Way of Shadow monk class action. It allows a monk to enter the shadows and disappear from sight.

Cloud of Jellyfish is passive feature available to Swarmkeepers. It turns the Gathered Swarm into jellyfish that deal ⁠Lightning damage and can shock enemies. This feature can be switched out at level up.
Cloudkill is a level 5 conjuration spell. It conjures a moveable cloud which damages and obscures everything it envelops.
Coast is a passive feature available to Circle of the Land Druids that pick this as their Land. It grants a couple extra spells every two levels
Colossus Slayer is a Hunter Ranger passive feature. This ability allows them to deal extra damage to targets whose Hit Points are below the maximum value.

Combat Inspiration is a passive feature and class action available to College of Valour Bards. This ability is an enhanced version of Bardic Inspiration that adds the ability to increase the target's armour class or damage.
Combat Wild Shape is a Circle of the Moon druid bonus action that allows them to Wild Shape. They gain access to all base druid wild shape forms as well as their own exclusive forms.
Command is a level 1 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to order their target to flee, move closer, freeze, drop to the ground, or drop their weapon.
Companion's Bond is a Beast Master Ranger passive feature that enhances your companion.
Compelled Duel is a level 1 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to compel an enemy to ignore other targets and attack only the spellcaster.
Cone of Cold is a level 5 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to blast icy air into a region in front of them, damaging affected creatures and turning existing Water surfaces into Ice Surfaces.
Confusion is a level 4 enchantment spell. It allows the caster to confuse a group of creatures, drastically reducing their effectiveness in combat.
Conjure Elemental is a level 5 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to summon a Fire, Earth, Water, or Air Elemental.
Conjure Minor Elemental is a level 4 conjuration spell. It conjures 2 Mud Mephits, 2 Ice Mephits, or an Azer to fight for you.
Contagion is a level 5 necromancy spell. It allows spellcasters to infect their target with an affliction of their choosing, potentially resulting in the target contracting a disease.
Control Undead is a Channel Oath action available to those that have chosen the path of the Oathbreaker paladin. This ability allows these paladins to gain control over the undead.
Controlled Chaos is a Wild Magic Sorcerer reaction that triggers a Wild Magic effect after an enemy spellcaster casts a spell.
Cosmic Omen is a passive feature that allows Circle of the Stars druids to consult the stars.
Create or Destroy Water is a level 1 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to conjure or destroy an area of water (or water-like surfaces).

Crown of Madness is a level 2 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to temporarily charm a humanoid creature and induce madness in their mind. The affected creature then makes a melee attack against any creature aside from the caster within its reach.
Crusader's Mantle is a level 3 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to imbue their allies' weapons with holy power, causing them to deal additional Radiant damage.
Curving Shot is an Arcane Archer fighter passive feature/reaction that allows the fighter to redirect a missed ranged weapon attack towards another nearby enemy.
Cutting Words is a reaction available to the College of Lore bards. It allows them to distract and confuse their foes, potentially causing attacks to miss, or ability checks or saving throws to fail.

Dampen Elements is a Nature Domain cleric passive feature and reaction. This ability allows the cleric to use a reaction and grant the player or one of their companions receiving elemental damage Resistance to that type.
Danger Sense is a Barbarian passive feature that gives you Advantage on Dexterity Saving Throws against traps, Spells, and surfaces as long as you aren't Blinded or Incapacitated.
Dark One's Blessing is a passive feature unique to The Fiend Warlock subclass that gives the Warlock temporary Hit Points when killing hostile creatures.
Dark One's Own Luck is a toggleable passive feature unique to The Fiend Warlock subclass that adds 1d10 to an Ability Check every Short Rest.
Darkness is a level 2 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to conjure a cloud of darkness in an area within range which obscures and inflicts Blindness to those within it.
Daylight is a level 3 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to dispel darkness by summoning a sphere of light or enchanting an item to shine like the sun.
Death Ward is a level 4 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to prevent a target from dying.

Defensive Flourish (Melee) is a College of Swords bard weapon action. This flourish manoeuvre allows the bard to spend Bardic Inspiration to enter a defensive stance after making a melee weapon attack which increases Armour Class by 4.

Defensive Flourish (Ranged) is a College of Swords bard weapon action. This flourish manoeuvre allows the bard to spend Bardic Inspiration to enter a defensive stance after making a ranged weapon attack which increases Armour Class by 4.
Desert is a passive feature available to Circle of the Land Druids that pick this as their Land. It grants a couple extra spells every two levels.
Destroy Undead is a Cleric passive feature that deals 4d6⁠⁠Radiant damage to creatures affected by Turn Undead.
Destructive Wave is a level 5 evocation spell. It allows the caster to create a massive shockwave that damages enemies and can possibly knock them prone.
Destructive Wrath is a reaction available to Tempest Domain clerics. This ability allows these clerics to maximise Thunder and Lightning damage rolls by expending a Channel Divinity Charge.
Detect Thoughts is a level 2 divination spell. It allows spellcasters to telepathically link to unprotected minds and hear the thoughts of targeted creatures while talking to them.
Dimension Door is a level 4 conjuration spell. It teleports the caster and an ally.

Dire Raven Companion is a variant of Ranger's Companion which is the signature Beast Master subclass feature. This ability allows the Beast Master to summon a raven companion to fight and aid them in combat. Only one beast companion of any time can be summoned at once.

feature: Dirty Trick: Flick o' the Wrist
description: Dirty Trick: Flick o' the Wrist is a weapon action available only to Swashbuckler rogues.
Dirty Trick: Sand Toss is a class action available to Swashbuckler rogues.
Dirty Trick: Vicious Mockery is a cantrip (Enchantment). It is only available to Swashbuckler rogues.
Disguise Self is a level 1 illusion spell. It allows spellcasters to temporarily change their appearance. While active, gain access to the action Dispel Disguise to end the effect.
Dissonant Whispers is a level 1 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to fill a target with terror and deal ⁠Psychic damage to them.
Divine Allegiance is a passive feature available to Oath of the Crown paladins which allows them to heal an adjacent ally when they take damage, at the cost of taking damage themselves.
Divine Intervention is a Cleric one-time free action that can perform one of several large-scale actions.
Divine Strike: Elemental Fury is a Nature Domain cleric weapon action and reaction that deals extra Cold, Fire, or Lightning damage upon a weapon strike (either melee or ranged).
Divine Strike: Necrotic (Ranged) is a Death Domain cleric weapon action and reaction that deals extra necrotic damage upon a ranged weapon strike.
Divine Strike: Poison (Melee) is a Trickery Domain cleric weapon action and reaction that deals extra poison damage upon a melee weapon strike.
Divine Strike: Radiant (Melee) is a Life Domain cleric weapon action and reaction that deals extra radiant damage upon a melee weapon strike.
Divine Strike: Thunder is a Tempest Domain cleric weapon action and reaction that deals extra thunder damage upon a weapon strike (either melee or ranged).
Divine Strike: Weapon is a War Domain cleric weapon action and reaction that deals extra damage upon a weapon strike (either melee or ranged).
Dominate Beast is a level 4 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to temporarily charm a Beast into fighting alongside the caster, rather than against them.
Dominate Person is a level 5 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to force a humanoid to temporarily fight as an ally.
Draconic Resilience is a Draconic Bloodline Sorcerer passive feature that raises the Sorcerer's base Armour Class to 13 when not wearing armour.
Dread Ambusher is a Gloom Stalker Ranger passive feature that makes you deadly on the first turn of combat.
Dread Ambusher: Hide is a Gloom Stalker Ranger bonus action. This ability allows Gloom Stalkers to use their bonus action to Hide from view.

Dreadful Aspect is a Channel Oath action available to paladins that have chosen the path of the Oathbreaker. This ability allows these paladins to channel their dark emotions to frighten their enemies.
Drunkard's Luck is a Way of the Drunken Master monk passive feature that allows them to succeed difficult rolls.
Drunken Performance is a Way of the Drunken Master monk passive feature that grants Performance proficiency.
Drunken Technique is a Way of the Drunken Master monk class action. It is an enhanced variant of Flurry of Blows that grants additional movement.
Duelling is a fighting style passive feature.
Eldritch Strike is an Eldritch Knight Fighter passive feature. This allows the Fighter to force a creature to have Disadvantage on its next Saving Throw by a mere weapon attack.

Elemental Affinity: Damage is a Draconic Bloodline Sorcerer passive feature that adds extra damage based on your Charisma Modifier to every spell you cast so long as it is the same type as your bloodline.
Elemental Affinity: Resistance is a Draconic Bloodline Sorcerer passive feature/reaction that grants you Resistance to the element matching your Draconic Bloodline
Elemental Cleaver is a Giant barbarian class action that allows them to add elemental damage to their weapons and gives them the Thrown property, as well as the ability to return once thrown.
Elemental Weapon is a level 3 transmutation spell. It imbues a weapon with a chosen energy type, increasing its damage and accuracy.
Embrace of the Inferno is a class action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to cast their equivalent of Scorching Ray by expending Ki Points instead of spell slots.
Empowered Evocation is an Evocation School Wizard passive feature which increases the damage of the caster's Evocation spells by their Intelligence modifier.
Enraged Throw is a Berserker barbarian bonus action. This ability allows the Berserker to make a ranged attack using nearby items or creatures.
Ensnaring Strike is a level 1 conjuration spell. This spell allows spellcasters to use weapon attacks to ensnare enemies with thorny vines and deal ⁠Piercing damage to them each turn.
Entropic Ward is a passive feature/reaction unique to The Great Old One Warlock subclass.
Escape the Horde is a Hunter Ranger passive feature that allow you to more safely escape the reach of an enemy.
Evard's Black Tentacles is a level 4 conjuration spell. It summons tentacles in an area that make it difficult to move and harm creatures.
Evasion is a Monk and Rogue passive feature that lets them evade area of effect damage which require Dexterity Saving Throws, reducing or entirely negating the damage.
Exceptional Training is a Beast Master Ranger passive feature that enhances your companion. They can now take several common actions as bonus actions.

Experimental Alchemy is a Transmutation School Wizard passive feature that enhances your mastery over alchemy. Whenever you combine extracts, you can brew two solutions instead of one provided you succeed a Medicine check.

Expert Divination is a Divination School Wizard passive feature which grants an additional Portent Die and allows its user to fulfill prophecies to restore any spent Portent Dice each short rest. These prophecies typically entail casting a spell from a specific school or dealing a specific type of damage.
Expertise is a passive feature that allows a character to double their Proficiency bonus on Skills.
Extra Attack is a passive feature that allows you to make an additional attack when making an Attack Action.
Eyes of the Dark is a passive feature that prevents Disadvantage when attacking creatures in the dark within 24 m (80 ft), double the distance of normal Darkvision.

Eyes of the Dark: Darkness is a level 2 evocation spell. It creates a dark cloud that heavily obscures and blinds all creatures inside, while the caster also gains a condition to see in this darkness for the spell's duration.
Faerie Fire is a level 1 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to conjure brilliant light. Any creature caught in the radius temporarily sheds faint light and prevents Invisibility.
Fancy Footwork is a passive feature available to Swashbuckler rogues which prevents the targets of their melee attacks from taking opportunity attacks against them.

Fangs of the Fire Snake is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to hit an enemy with an unarmed strike from range, dealing bonus 1d10⁠⁠Fire damage and buffing subsequent attacks with 1d4⁠⁠Fire damage.
Fast Hands is a Thief Rogue passive feature that grants an extra Bonus Action
Fast Movement is a Barbarian passive feature that increases your Movement Speed by 3m / 10ft while not wearing Heavy Armour.
Fear is a level 3 illusion spell. It allows spellcasters to terrify targets by projecting phantasmal images, forcing enemies to flee.
Feral Instinct is a Barbarian passive feature. The barbarian is always ready for battle and can't be caught off-guard.
Fey Presence is an Archfey Warlock class action. This ability allows the Warlock to charm or frighten enemies at short range.
Fiendish Resilience is a free action unique to The Fiend warlock subclass that lets the warlock choose a damage type to be resistant to every Short Rest.

A fighting style is a class feature available to multiple classes and subclasses, which increases their combat efficacy with certain weapons and armour. Once learned, fighting styles are permanently active and cannot be disabled. Respeccing with Withers can remove or change a chosen fighting style. Protection is the only Fighting Style which allows the character to choose whether or not it is applied, as a Reaction. Each fighting style can only be chosen once. The Champion Fighter is the only class/subclass in the game that is able to learn two fighting styles without multiclassing. If multiple fighting styles are learned, they all apply as normal. A character dual wielding Hand Crossbows with both Archery and Two-Weapon Fighting gains +2 to attack rolls with both weapons, and adds their Dexterity modifier to the off-hand weapon's damage.
Fire Shield is a level 4 evocation spell. It shields the spellcaster with luminous energy.
Fireball is a level 3 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to unleash a streak of fire from their hands which ignites into a large explosion at a chosen point within range.
Fist of Four Thunders is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to push creatures and objects away. It is the monk equivalent of Thunderwave.
Fist of Unbroken Air is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to punch an enemy at distance, sending them flying backwards.
Flame Strike is a level 5 evocation spell. It allows the caster to make a pillar of divine flame at a chosen location dealing 5d6⁠⁠Fire damage and 5d6⁠⁠Radiant damage.
Flames of the Phoenix is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to cast their equivalent of Fireball by expending Ki Points instead of spell slots.
Flaming Sphere is a level 2 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to conjure a Flaming Sphere which can attack and burn enemies.
Flurry of Blows: Push is a Way of the Open Hand monk class action. It is an enhanced variant of Flurry of Blows that can potentially push the target away.
Flurry of Blows: Stagger is a Way of the Open Hand monk class action. It is an enhanced variant of Flurry of Blows that will stagger the target, preventing it from using Reactions.
Flurry of Blows: Topple is a Way of the Open Hand monk class action. It is an enhanced variant of Flurry of Blows that can potentially knock a target Prone.
Flurry of Moths is passive feature available to Swarmkeepers. It turns the Gathered Swarm into moths that deal ⁠Psychic damage and can blind enemies. This feature can be switched out at level up.

Fly may refer to: Fly (bonus action), the class action granted by Helldusk Armour which grants Flight. Fly (class action), the movement action commonly used by flying creatures as well as with the Flight condition. Fly (Dire Raven Companion), the movement action used by the raven animal companion. Fly (Dragons), the movement action used by dragons. Fly (Illithid Power), the movement action used by partial-illithids. Fly (Spiritual Weapon), the movement action used by Spiritual Weapons. Fly (Starry Form), the movement action used by Circle of the Stars druids. See also: Flight, the condition which grants the Fly action. Grant Flight, the transmutation spell that grants flight which is named Fly in the tabletop. Ride the Wind, the monk class action equivalent to the spell. Levitate, the movement action used by full-illithids Tempestuous Magic: Flight, the bonus action used by Storm sorcerers.
Focused Conjuration is a Conjuration School Wizard passive feature that prevents the caster from losing concentration on Conjuration spells.

The Forest is a Location within the Wilderness in Act One of Baldur's Gate 3. It is found west of the Emerald Grove and encompasses the entirety of the Blighted Village. “ Nothing like a brisk stroll through the forest to invigorate the spirit <...> And without so much as a stirring from our tadpoles. „ — Gale, bantering with Karlach
Freedom of Movement is a level 4 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to imbue an ally with the ability to avoid some slowing effects.
Frenzied Strike is a Berserker barbarian bonus action. This ability allows the Berserker to make a melee attack as a bonus action once per turn while frenzied.

Frenzy is a Berserker barbarian bonus action that is a variant of Rage. It turns the Berserker's anger into an uncontrollable fury and grants additional abilities in addition to those from Rage. Wearing Heavy Armour triggers the Rage Impeded condition, removing some benefits of Frenzy.
Fungal Infestation is a action gained by Circle of the Spores druids at level 6 that allows them to raise a Fungal Zombie from a nearby corpse using a resource exclusive to this action.
Gaseous Form is a level 3 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to transform themselves or an ally into a cloud of mist to avoid attacks, reduce size, and gain Advantage on some Saving Throws.
Giant Killer is a Hunter ranger passive feature and reaction. This ability allows rangers to retaliate with a melee attack using their reactions when attacked by a large creature.

Giant's Rage is a Giant barbarian class action that is a variant of Rage. This ability channels the barbarian's rage towards throwing objects and people. Like other rage abilities, wearing Heavy Armour triggers the Rage Impeded condition, removing some benefits of Giant's Rage.
Gong of the Summit is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to cast their equivalent of Shatter by expending Ki Points instead of spell slots.
Grant Flight is a level 3 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to grant a creature they touch the ability to fly.
Grasping Vine is a level 4 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to summon a Grasping Vine which can pull enemies toward itself.
Grassland is a passive feature available to Circle of the Land Druids that pick this as their Land. It grants a couple extra spells every two levels
Greater Invisibility is a level 4 illusion spell. It allows spellcasters to provide a more resilient form of Invisibility for their allies.
Greater Restoration is a level 5 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to removes any kind of charm, petrification, stun, or curse effect from a creature.

Grim Harvest is a Necromancy School Wizard passive feature. It allows the caster to regain hit points every time they kill a creature with a spell. The amount regained is based on the spell slot level used, and is increased if a Necromancy spell is used.
Guardian of Faith is a level 4 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to summon a divine guardian which sacrifices its Hit Points to damage enemies.
Guidance is a cantrip (Divination). This cantrip allows spellcasters to grant a temporary bonus to a creature's ability checks.

Guided Strike is a Channel Divinity reaction available to War Domain clerics. This ability allows these clerics to apply a +10 bonus to their missed Attack Rolls, potentially turning them into hits. War Domain clerics additionally get War God's Blessing at a later level which applies the same effect to attacks by allies.
Guiding Bolt is a level 1 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to hit enemies with a bolt that deals ⁠Radiant damage and grants advantage to the next attack roll made against them.
Gust of Wind is a level 2 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to conjure a squall to clear dangerous gasses or throw creatures back, potentially causing a dangerous fall.
Halo of Spores is a Circle of the Spores druid class action. It releases spores that deal necrotic damage to a nearby target.
Harmony of Fire and Water is a class action that allows the Way of the Four Elements Monk to recover half of their max Ki Points outside of combat, but can only be used once per long rest.
Haste is a level 3 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to allow their allies to become Hastened.

Healing Radiance is a Channel Oath bonus action available to Oath of the Ancients paladins. This ability allows these paladins to channel their oath to heal allies in an area over the course of 1 round.

Heart of the Storm: Lightning is a Storm Sorcery Sorcerer free reaction, part of Heart of the Storm, that creates a storm that deals half your Sorcerer level, rounded down, when you cast a lightning spell.
Heart of the Storm: Resistance is a Storm Sorcery Sorcerer passive that gives you resistance to both Lightning and Thunder damage.

Heart of the Storm: Thunder is a free Storm Sorcery Sorcerer class reaction, part of Heart of the Storm, that creates a storm that deals half your Sorcerer level, rounded down, when you cast a thunder spell.
Hellish Rebuke is a level 1 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to surround a creature in hellfire that deals ⁠Fire damage as a Reaction when taking damage from them.
Hex Warrior is a passive feature granted to The Hexblade warlocks at level 1.
Hexblade's Curse is a class action available to The Hexblade warlocks that allows them to curse targets.
Hold Monster is a level 5 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to Paralyse a creature, preventing them from acting and making them vulnerable to attacks.
Hold Person is a level 2 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to hold a target humanoid in place. The affected creature is unable to move or act and is more susceptible to attacks.

Holy Rebuke is a Channel Oath action available to Oath of Devotion paladins. This ability allows these paladins to grant a target a vengeful aura that damages the attacker each time the target is hit in melee.
Horde Breaker is a Hunter Ranger passive feature that grants you the ability to target two creatures next to each other.
Hound of Ill Omen is a Shadow Magic sorcerer class action which allows them to summon Nimbus, a shadow mastiff.
Hunter's Mark is a level 1 divination spell. It allows spellcasters to mark a creature as their prey and deal additional ⁠Weapon damage to the targeted creature.

Hypnotic Gaze is an Enchantment School wizard class action which hypnotises a creature, rendering it entirely incapacitated for a brief period. Additional actions can be spent to maintain this effect.
Hypnotic Pattern is a level 3 illusion spell. It allows spellcasters to hypnotise all creatures within an area.
Ice Storm is a level 4 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to summon an ice storm to strike an area.
Illusory Self is an Illusion School wizard passive feature and reaction that lets a character substitute a duplicate image of themselves when receiving an attack, causing the attacker to miss.
Improved Abjuration is a passive feature of the Abjuration School Wizard. When you take a Short Rest, you can boost your Arcane Ward charges by your wizard level.
Improved Combat Superiority is a Battle Master Fighter passive feature that increases the strength of their Maneuvers.
Improved Critical Hit is a Champion Fighter passive feature that reduces the number they need to roll for a critical hit by 1.
Improved Divine Smite is a passive feature available to Paladins that adds extra damage to all of their weapon strikes. This damage stacks with all other sources.
Improved Elemental Casting is a Way of the Four Elements Monk passive feature that improves the strength and damage of your Four Elements Spells.
Improved Extra Attack is a Fighter passive feature that allows you to make 2 additional attacks when making an Attack Action.
Improved Minor Illusion is a cantrip (Illusion). It is an upgraded version of Minor Illusion available to Illusion School wizards which only costs a Bonus Action.
Improved Warding Flare is a Light Domain cleric reaction that complements Warding Flare to give these clerics the option to protect allies instead of themselves.
Indomitable is a Fighter passive feature/reaction that lets you reroll a failed Saving Throw. It is a free action, and therefore does not consume your Reaction when used.
Inescapable Destruction is a Death Domain cleric passive feature. It allows ⁠Necrotic dealt by the cleric to bypass Resistance to ⁠Necrotic damage.

Infiltration Expertise is a class action that lets Assassin Rogues adopt the identity of a male or female of any humanoid race, though the type is selected the actual appearance is random. It is similar to the spell Disguise Self.
Inflict Wounds is a level 1 necromancy spell. It allows the spellcaster to make a melee attack which inflicts Necrotic damage.

Inquisitor's Might is a bonus action available to Oath of Vengeance paladins. This ability allows these paladins to grant a 2 turn single-target buff which causes their or their allies' weapon attacks to deal an additional ⁠Radiant damage and Daze enemies for 1 turn.
Insect Plague is a level 5 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to create a damaging, debilitating swarm of insects over a section of the battlefield.

Instinctive Charm is an Enchantment School wizard passive feature and reaction that charms an attacker, interrupting and preventing the attack. If the target succeeds the Wisdom Saving Throw, it cannot be affected again until after a Long Rest.
Intimidating Presence is a Berserker barbarian class action. This ability allows the barbarian instil fear into a enemy.
Intoxicating Strike is a Way of the Drunken Master monk class action. It allows a monk to intoxicate enemies on failed Constitution Saving Throws.
Inured to Undeath is a Necromancy School Wizard passive feature that enhances your mastery over death. You become resistant to Necrotic damage and cannot have your maximum hit points reduced.

Invisibility commonly refers to: Invisibility (spell), the level 2 illusion spell Invisible (Condition), the condition granted by many abilities Invisibility may also refer to: Greater Invisibility, the stronger level 4 illusion spell Greater Invisibility (Condition), the condition granted by Greater Invisibility Invisibility (Air Myrmidon), the class action used by Air Myrmidons Invisibility (class action), the class action used by Yurgir Invisibility (Duergar), the racial class action available to Duergar Invisibility (Imp), the class action used by Imps Invisibility (Quasit), the class action used by the Quasit familiar Potion of Invisibility, a consummable item that grants invisibility See Invisibility (class action), the level 6 Illusion School Wizard class action See Invisibility (Condition), the condition See Invisibility (spell), the level 2 divination spell Scroll of Invisibility, a scroll that casts the spell Third Eye: See Invisibility, the level 10 Divination School Wizard class action

Invoke Duplicity is a Channel Divinity action available to Trickery Domain clerics which allows them to summon illusory duplicates of themselves. These illusions distract adjacent enemies giving allies advantage on attacks against them. Enemies may even target the illusions, wasting their actions.
Iron Mind is a Gloom Stalker Ranger passive feature that increases your defenses against certain mental attacks.

Ki Resonation: Blast is a Way of the Open Hand monk free action that allows to detonate the ki in anyone resonating with the monk. The explosion hits the creature and all creatures other than party members and summoned creatures nearby. Any additional targets hit by the explosion that are also resonating create additional explosions in a chain reaction.
Ki Resonation: Punch is a Way of the Open Hand monk class action that allows you to punch a target, activating the Ki within them. You can then detonate this Ki to cause an explosion.
Ki Resonation: Punch (Bonus Action) is a Way of the Open Hand monk bonus action that allows you to punch a target, activating the ki within them. You can then detonate this ki to cause an explosion.
Knowledge of the Ages is a Channel Divinity action available to Knowledge Domain clerics. It allows these clerics to channel divine power, gaining proficiency in all skills of a chosen ability score.

Land's Stride: Difficult Terrain is a passive feature that makes it so that you are not slowed when traversing Difficult Terrain. It is the visible component of Land's Stride which includes additional hidden passives.
Leap to Your Feet is a Way of the Drunken Master monk passive feature that helps them get up quicker from being prone.
Legion of Bees is passive feature available to Swarmkeepers. It turns the Gathered Swarm into bees that deal ⁠Piercing damage and can push enemies away. This feature can be switched out at level up.
Lesser Restoration is a level 2 abjuration spell. It allows the spellcaster to cure an adjacent creature.
Life of the Party is a Way of the Drunken Master monk passive feature that grants bonuses against Drunk targets.
Light is a cantrip (Evocation). It makes an object shed light in a small area.
Lightning Bolt is a level 3 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to discharge a bolt of lightning in any direction, potentially hitting multiple creatures.
Lunar Mend is a Circle of the Moon druid bonus action. It allows wild shaped Moon druids to expend spell slots to heal themselves.
Mage Hand is a cantrip (Conjuration). It conjures a spectral hand that can interact with objects.
Mage Hand Legerdemain is an Arcane Trickster Rogue passive feature. This ability enhances your Mage Hand, allowing it to remain permanently and granting it invisibility.
Magic Arrow is an Arcane Archer fighter passive feature that makes their arrows considered magical.
Magic Awareness is a Wild Magic Barbarian bonus action which gives a brief bonus to saving throws for barbarian and nearby creatures.
Magic Weapon is a level 2 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to infuse a weapon with arcane energy, making it magical.
Magical Ambush is a togglable passive gained by Arcane Tricksters at Level 9. Magical Ambush allows the Rogue to circumvent their target's defenses when casting spells while hidden.
Magical Secrets is a level 6 College of Lore, and level 10 base Bard class feature in which they learn 2 Spells from a set belonging to other classes.
Manifestation of Body is a togglable passive feature unique to Way of the Open Hand Monks at Level 6, that adds extra ⁠Necrotic damage based on your Wisdom Modifier to unarmed attacks.
Manifestation of Mind is a togglable passive feature unique to Way of the Open Hand Monks at Level 6, that adds extra ⁠Psychic damage based on your Wisdom Modifier to unarmed attacks.
Manifestation of Soul is a togglable passive feature unique to Way of the Open Hand Monks at Level 6, that adds extra ⁠Radiant damage based on your Wisdom Modifier to unarmed attacks.
Mantle of Inspiration is a College of Glamour bard class action that protects allies with a mantle that charms enemies that hit them.
Mantle of Majesty: Command is a College of Glamour bard class action that commands enemies using a bonus action. It can be used repeatedly for 10 turns or until concentration is broken.
Mass Cure Wounds is a level 5 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to heal several of their allies.
Melf's Acid Arrow is a level 2 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to shoot a magical arrow that deals Acid damage to a target on impact and at the end of its next turn.

Metamagic is a Sorcerer class feature that allows the user to add additional effects to magic spells in exchange for Sorcery Points. When a metamagic passive is toggled on, affected spells will get a white glow and the Sorcery Points will be added to the spell cost. Two metamagic types are chosen at level 2, with one additional metamagic chosen at levels 3 and 10. Sorcery Points are regained after a Long Rest.
Mighty Impel is a Giant barbarian class action that allows them to throw creatures or objects.
Mighty Swarm is a Swarmkeeper ranger passive feature that increases the power of their swarm.
Mindless Rage is a Berserker Barbarian passive feature. While raging, these barbarians cannot be Charmed or Frightened.

This spell is a special class version of Create or Destroy Water that also allows the Conjuration School wizard to conjure an area of water once per short rest. This action is equivalent to the level 1 version, but does not consume spell slots and cannot be upcasted.
Minor Illusion is a cantrip (Illusion). It conjures a simple illusion to distract and / or lure creatures.
Mirror Image is a level 2 illusion spell. It allows spellcasters to create 3 illusory duplicates of themselves to distract attackers.
Mist Stance is a class action that allows the Way of the Four Elements monk to cast the equivalent of the level 3 Wizard spell Gaseous Form that can only affect the caster.
Misty Escape is an Archfey warlock passive feature/reaction that allows the warlock to become invisible upon taking damage.
Misty Step is a level 2 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to teleport themselves to an unoccupied space they can see.

Mobile Flourish (Melee) is a College of Swords Bard weapon action. This flourish manoeuvre allows the Bard to use a Bardic Inspiration to deal extra damage to a target with a melee weapon, sending them flying backwards. Afterwards, you can teleport next to them.

Mobile Flourish (Ranged) is a College of Swords Bard weapon action. This flourish manoeuvre allows the Bard to use a Bardic Inspiration to deal extra damage to a target with a ranged weapon, sending them flying backwards. Afterwards, you can teleport next to them.
Moonbeam is a level 2 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to call down a beam of moonlight which deals Radiant damage to any creature that enters the beam or starts its turn there.
Mortal Reminder is a passive feature unique to The Great Old One Warlock subclass that Frightens creatures upon a critical hit.
Mountain is a passive feature available to Circle of the Land Druids that pick this as their Land. It grants a couple extra spells every two levels
Multiattack Defence is a Hunter Ranger passive feature which strengthens its user's defenses against enemies that attack them more than once per turn.
Mystic Arcanum is a level 11 Warlock class feature in which they learn one 6th Level spell. You can cast this spell once per Long Rest, and it does not expend a spell slot.
Natural Recovery is a Circle of the Land druid class action. This ability allows these druids to replenish a number of spell slots each long rest.
Nature's Ward is a Circle of the Land Druid passive feature that grants immunity to Charm and Frighten effects from elementals and fey creatures. The Druid also becomes immune to Disease and Poison.
Nature's Wrath is a Channel Oath action available to Oath of the Ancients paladins. This ability allows the paladin to root an enemy in place, leaving their guard open to attacks.

Otiluke's Resilient Sphere is a level 4 evocation spell. It surrounds a target in an impenetrable protective sphere which blocks everything from coming in or out of the sphere. The encased creature is rendered completely invulnerable to outside attacks or spells, but conversely is blocked from attacking or targeting anything outside the sphere.
Pact Boon is a passive feature that grants you abilities depending on your choice of Boon.
Panache is a class action available to Swashbuckler rogues.
Pass Without Trace is a level 2 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to grant themselves and nearby allies a bonus to Stealth Checks.

Phantasmal Force is a level 2 illusion spell. It allows spellcasters to flood a target creature's mind with an illusion of the last thing that attacked it, dealing 1d6⁠⁠Psychic damage per turn, changing to the last type of damage inflicted upon the target.

Phantasmal Killer is a level 4 illusion spell. It allows spellcasters to temporarily haunt a creatures mind with illusions, dealing damage, preventing movement, and imposing Disadvantage on Ability Checks and Attack Rolls.
Plant Growth is a level 3 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to cause an area to expel weeds from the ground, quartering the movement speed of all creatures travelling through the area.
Poison Spray is a cantrip (Conjuration). It allows spellcasters to deal ⁠Poison damage to a target.
Polymorph is a level 4 transmutation spell. It transforms a creature into a sheep.

Portent is a Divination School Wizard passive feature which offers the user glimpses into the future. They gain two random Portent Dice which they can use as a Reaction to substitute into Attack Rolls and Saving Throws rolled in range.
Potent Cantrip is an Evocation School Wizard passive feature increases the reliability of your damaging Cantrips such that even a miss hurts your target.
Potent Spellcasting is a Light Domain and Knowledge Domain Cleric passive feature that adds the Cleric's Wisdom Modifier to the damage of Cleric Cantrips.
Preserve Life is a Channel Divinity action available to Life Domain clerics. This ability allows these clerics to heal their allies.
Prey's Scent is a passive feature only found on Beast Master Hunter's Summon Companion.
Primal Strike is a Circle of the Moon Druid passive feature that makes their beast form attacks count as magical damage.
Produce Flame is a cantrip (Conjuration). It creates a blue flame in the caster's palm which emanates light and can be thrown at enemies.
Projected Ward is a reaction feature of the Abjuration School wizard. When a nearby ally takes damage, you can use an Arcane Ward charge to reduce the damage.
Protection from Energy is a level 3 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to grant a creature they touch Resistance to an element of their choice.

Protection from Evil and Good is a level 1 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to surround themselves with magical protection against Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead.
Radiance of the Dawn is a Channel Divinity action available to Light Domain clerics. This ability allows these clerics to channel divine power and deal radiant damage to all nearby enemies.

Rage is a Barbarian bonus action and class feature. Enter a Rage to gain resistance against physical damage, deal extra melee and thrown damage, and Advantage on Strength checks and Saving Throws. Wearing heavy armour imposes the Rage Impeded condition, removing most benefits of Rage.
Rage: Wild Magic is a Wild Magic Barbarian bonus action. It replaces normal Rage and triggers a random magical effect when entering the rage.
Rakish Audacity is a passive feature available to Swashbuckler rogues which grants a scaling bonus to initiative and relaxes some of the requirements for triggering Sneak Attack.

Rakish Sneak Attack (Melee) is a Swashbuckler rogue weapon action which replaces normal Sneak Attack. This ability allows the rogue to exploit an enemy's distraction and deal extra damage to their vulnerable spots with melee weapons. The weapon must have the Finesse property, but can still utilise Strength if it is higher than Dexterity.

Rakish Sneak Attack (Ranged) is a Swashbuckler rogue weapon action. This ability allows the rogue to exploit an enemy's distraction and deal extra damage to their vulnerable spots with ranged weapons.
Ranger's Companion is a Beast Master Ranger class action. This ability allows the Beast Master to call upon their animal companion to fight and aid them in combat.

Ray of Enfeeblement is a level 2 necromancy spell. It allows spellcasters to make a ranged spell attack against a creature and sap their Strength. A weakened creature deals half damage with weapon attacks that use Strength.

Reckless Attack is a Barbarian weapon action that grants advantage on all attacks for 1 round, but makes all incoming attacks targetting the barbarian also have advantage for the same duration. It can alternatively be triggered as a free post-strike reaction on a miss (provided the attack was not already benefiting from advantage).
Redirect Attack is a Way of the Drunken Master monk reaction/passive feature that allows the monk to make an unarmed attack against the attacker.
Relentless Avenger is an Oath of Vengeance Paladin passive feature. This ability allows a Paladin to pursue fleeing enemies.
Relentless Rage is a Barbarian passive feature. While raging, the barbarian is harder to defeat.
Reliable Talent is a passive feature gained by rogues at level 11. It treats any roll under 10 as a 10.
Remarkable Athlete: Jump is a Champion Fighter passive feature that increases their jump distance by 3 m (10 ft).
Remarkable Athlete: Proficiency is a Champion Fighter passive feature that adds half of their Proficiency Bonus to any Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution Checks they are not Proficient in.
Remove Curse is a level 3 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to remove all curses afflicting a target by touch.
Revivify is a level 3 necromancy spell. It allows the spellcaster to bring a Companion with 0 hit points back to life.
Ride the Wind is a class action that allows a monk following the Way of the Four Elements to fly.
Righteous Clarity is a Channel Oath action available to Oath of the Crown paladins which grants the paladin or an ally a bonus to attack rolls equal to their proficiency bonus.

Rush of the Gale Spirits is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to conjure a squall to clear dangerous gasses or throw creatures back, potentially causing a dangerous fall. This action is the monk's equivalent of Gust of Wind

Sacred Weapon is a Channel Oath action available to Oath of Devotion paladins. This ability allows them to channel positive energy into their weapons, adding their Charisma Modifier to their attack rolls.
Sanctuary is a level 1 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to ward themselves or an ally against enemy attacks.

Scimitars are a type of one-handed martial melee weapon. The following are some base attributes common to most scimitars, although special or magical variants may be significantly different. For the most common, nonmagical type of this weapon, see Scimitar. Further down below, you can find a list of all scimitars in the game.
Scorching Ray is a level 2 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to hurl 3 rays of fire at one or more targets within range. Each ray has a separate Attack Roll and deals Fire damage.
Sculpt Spells is an Evocation School passive feature prevents your allies from taking damage from some of your spells.
Second-Story Work: Falling is a Thief Rogue passive feature that grants Resistance against falling damage.

See Invisibility might refer to: See Invisibility (class action), the level 6 Illusion School Wizard class action Third Eye: See Invisibility, the level 10 Divination School Wizard class action See Invisibility (Condition), the condition See Invisibility (spell), the level 2 divination spell See also: Revealed, the condition applied to creatures that are revealed by See Invisibility actions Seeker Matrix, an action equivalent to See Invisibility used by Steel Watchers
Seeming is a level 5 illusion spell. It allows spellcasters to disguise their allies.
Shadow Arts: Darkness is a Way of Shadow monk class action. This ability allows these monks to conjure a cloud of darkness in an area within range that obscures and blinds those within it.
Shadow Arts: Darkvision is a Way of Shadow monk class action. It allows a monk to alter a creature's sight, granting them the ability to see in the dark.
Shadow Arts: Hide is a Way of Shadow Monk class action. It allows a monk to Hide from view using a Bonus Action.
Shadow Arts: Pass Without Trace is a Way of Shadow monk class action that grants a stealth bonus to the caster and nearby allies.

Shadow Arts: Silence is a Way of Shadow monk class action. It allows a monk to summon a sphere of absolute quietness in an area within range. Creatures within this sphere are immune to ⁠Thunder damage and cannot cast verbal spells.
Shadow Step is a Way of Shadow monk class action. It allows a monk to enter the shadows and reappear at a distant, obscure location, gaining Advantage on their next melee attack.
Shadow Strike is a Way of Shadow monk weapon action. It lets a monk strike from the shadows with their weapon dealing bonus ⁠Psychic damage.
Shadow Strike: Unarmed is a Way of Shadow monk class action. It lets a monk strike from the shadows with their fists dealing bonus ⁠Psychic damage.
Shadow Walk is a Shadow Magic sorcerer class action granted at level 11. It allows a sorcerer to teleport into shadow and cast a spell at a distance without using sorcery points.
Shapechanger is a Transmutation School wizard class action that allows a wizard to transform into a blue jay at will, without expending any spell slots.
Shaping of the Ice is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to create an ice cube that can be climbed.

Shatter is a level 2 evocation spell. It allows the spellcaster to generate a deafening noise explosion that can damage multiple creatures and objects. This spell is especially potent against inorganic targets, which must make their Saving Throw at Disadvantage.
Shield may refer to: Shield (condition) Shield (item) Shield (spell) Shields (equipment)
Shillelagh is a cantrip (Transmutation). It imbues the caster's weapon with nature power.

Silence is a level 2 illusion spell. It allows spellcasters to summon a sphere of absolute quiet in an area within range. Creatures within this sphere are immune to ⁠Thunder damage and cannot cast verbal spells.

Slashing Flourish (Melee) is a College of Swords bard weapon action. It allows the bard to use a Bardic Inspiration to make a sweeping melee weapon attack which deals extra damage and can hit up to two enemies.

Slashing Flourish (Ranged) is a College of Swords bard weapon action. This flourish manoeuvre allows the bard to use a Bardic Inspiration to make a ranged weapon attack that fires two separate projectiles and deals bonus damage. The two projectiles may be directed at two separate targets or both at a single target.
Sleep is a level 1 enchantment spell. It allows the spellcaster to temporarily make conscious creatures fall into a deep slumber.
Sleet Storm is a level 3 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to call forth a storm that douses fire, creates an icy surface, and disrupts the concentration of spellcasters.
Slow is a level 3 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to reduce movement speed, Armour Class, and Dexterity Saving Throws, and also limit actions.
Sobering Realisation is a Way of the Drunken Master monk class action. It lets a monk sober up an intoxicated target by striking them.
Song of Defence is a passive feature/reaction available to Bladesinging wizards which lets them expend spell slots to reduce incoming damage.
Speak with Animals is a level 1 divination spell. It allows spellcasters to understand and talk to beasts until they long rest.
Speak with Dead is a level 3 necromancy spell. It allows spellcasters to grant a semblance of life to a corpse, allowing it to answer questions.
Sphere of Elemental Balance is an action; it allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to create a sphere that channels different elements. This action is the monk's equivalent of Chromatic Orb.

Spike Growth is a level 2 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to transform an area of land into a hazardous spiky terrain. Creatures walking through the area have their speed halved and take Piercing damage.
Spirit Guardians is a level 3 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to call forth spirits to damage nearby targets and slow their Movement.
Spiritual Weapon is a level 2 evocation spell. It summons a floating weapon that can attack enemies. The caster can choose between several different weapons, and each has a different weapon action.

Spiteful Suffering is a Channel Oath action available to Oathbreaker paladins. This ability allows these paladins to steep their enemies in darkness, causing necrotic damage and leaving them susceptible to attacks.
Split Enchantment is an Enchantment School Wizard toggleable passive feature that enables you to target 2 creatures when casting an Enchantment school spell that normally only targets 1.

Spreading Spores is a Circle of the Spores druid class action unlocked at level 10. With Symbiotic Entity active, these druids can create lingering clouds of spores that deal necrotic damage to any creatures within.
Staggering Smite is a level 4 evocation spell. It adds ⁠Psychic damage to the spellcaster's weapon as they strike, possibly staggering the target when hit.
Stalker's Flurry is a Gloom Stalker Ranger passive feature that lets you continue attacking when you miss.

Star Map: Guiding Bolt is a level 1 evocation spell. This spell exclusive to the Circle of the Stars druid, allows spellcasters to hit enemies with radiant bolt that deals ⁠Radiant damage and grants advantage to attack rolls made against them.
Starry Form is a passive feature that grants starry forms to Circle of the Stars druids.
Starry Form: Archer is a bonus action available to Circle of the Stars druids. It lets them enter a Starry Form where they can shoot arrows made of light.

Starry Form: Chalice is a bonus action available to Circle of the Stars druids. It lets them enter a Starry Form where they gain a free healing action that recharges every time they cast a healing spell.

Starry Form: Dragon is a bonus action available to Circle of the Stars druids. It lets them enter a Starry Form where they gain a radiant breath attack and significant bonus to concentration saving throws. At higher levels, druids in this form additionally gain the ability to hover and fly.
Steel Will is a Hunter Ranger passive feature that strengthens your mind against fear.

Stinking Cloud is a level 3 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to create a nauseating cloud of gas which can prevent creatures from taking actions. Targets must make Constitution Saving Throws every turn while they are in the area of effect or become Nauseous.
Stoneskin is a level 4 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to harden the skin of their ally, granting them Resistance to non-magical physical damage.

Storm's Fury is a Storm Sorcery sorcerer passive feature and reaction unlocked at level 11. When struck by a melee attacker, the sorcerer can use this reaction push the attacker away with a blast of lightning damage.
Strength of the Grave is a passive feature that prevents the first death.
Superior Darkvision is a passive feature that prevents Disadvantage when attacking creatures in the dark within 24 m (80 ft), double the distance of normal Darkvision.
Supreme Sneak is a Thief rogue class action. This ability allows the Thieves to become invisible for a limited amount of time.
Swamp is a passive feature available to Circle of the Land Druids that pick this as their Land. It grants a couple extra spells every two levels

Sweeping Cinder Strike is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to shoot a flaming cone from their fingertips and deal ⁠Fire damage to enemies. This is the monk's equivalent of Burning Hands.

Symbiotic Entity is a Circle of the Spores druid class action. Instead of transforming into a beast, these druids can spend a Wild Shape Charge to enter Symbiotic Entity form. In this form, they gain temporary hit points and deal additional ⁠Necrotic damage with weapon or unarmed attacks and Halo of Spores. It is lost when the temporary hit points are depleted.
Tasha's Hideous Laughter is a level 1 enchantment spell. It allows spellcasters to send a targeted creature into a fit of laughter, falling Prone.
Telekinesis is a level 5 transmutation spell. It allows spellcasters to throw creatures and objects around with only their mind.
Tempestuous Magic is a Storm Sorcery Sorcerer passive feature that enables you to safely disengage from enemies after casting a leveled spell.
Thaumaturgy is a cantrip (Transmutation). It temporarily improves the caster's Intimidation and Performance checks.
Third Eye: Darkvision is a Divination School wizard class action that gives you the ability to see in the darkness all the way up to 24 m (80 ft) (akin to Superior Darkvision) until the next day.
Third Eye: See Invisibility is a Divination School wizard class action that gives you the ability to see invisible creatures nearby until Long Rest. It is akin to the spell See Invisibility.
Thorn Whip is a cantrip (Transmutation). It deals damage to a target and pulls it closer to the caster.
Thought Shield: Psychic Reflection is a passive feature unique to The Great Old One Warlock subclass that damages attackers with the same damage when damaged with Psychic damage.
Thought Shield: Psychic Resistance is a passive feature unique to The Great Old One Warlock subclass that grants Resistance to Psychic damage.
Thunderbolt Strike is a Tempest Domain cleric passive feature that pushes Large or smaller creatures 3 m (10 ft) that are dealt ⁠Thunder or ⁠Lightning damage from the cleric.

Thunderwave is a level 1 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to project out a deafening force that can hit multiple creatures and objects. Creatures hit by this force may be pushed away from the spellcaster.

Tides of Chaos is a Wild Magic sorcerer toggleable passive feature which grants Advantage on the sorcerer's next ability check. After this feature is triggered, the next spell cast has a greatly increased chance of a creating a Wild Magic surge (50% chance instead of the normal 5%). Alternatively, this feature can be triggered after a roll is failed with the corresponding reaction.
Touch of Death is a Death Domain cleric reaction which allows the cleric to deal extra ⁠Necrotic damage after a melee attack.

Touch of the Storm is an action that allows the Way of the Four Elements monk to strike nearby enemies with lightning, causing them to be unable to use reactions. This is the monk's equivalent of Shocking Grasp.
Training in War and Song is a passive feature of Bladesinging Wizards which grants them proficiencies in light armour and one-handed blade weapons.
Tranquillity is a Way of the Open Hand Monk passive feature that prevents enemies from directly harming the monk until the first time they attack each day (effectively a free use of Sanctuary).
Transmuter's Stone is a Transmutation School Wizard free action that allows you to create Transmuter's Stones which allow you to give a creature various benefits by holding that stone.
True Strike is a cantrip (Divination). It gives the caster Advantage on their next Attack Roll against the target.
Turn the Faithless is a Channel Oath action available to Oath of the Ancients paladins. It allows these paladins to make fey and fiends flee from them.
Turn the Tide is a Channel Oath action available to Oath of the Crown paladins which heals all nearby allies and neutral creatures.
Turn the Unholy is a Channel Oath action available to Oath of Devotion paladins. This ability allows these paladins to make undead and fiends flee from them.
Turn Undead is a Channel Divinity action available to clerics of any domain. As an action, they can present their holy symbols and cause undead creatures to flee.
Twinkling Constellations is a passive feature that improves the starry forms of Circle of the Stars druids.
Two-Weapon Fighting is a Fighting style passive feature. It allows characters to effectively dual-wield two weapons with the Light property, adding damage.
Umbral Shroud is a Gloom Stalker Ranger class action that lets you become Invisible so long as you are enshrouded in shadows.
Unarmoured Defence is a class feature for different classes: Unarmoured Defence Unarmoured Defence
Uncanny Dodge is a togglable passive gained by Rogues at Level 5. Uncanny Dodge allows the Rogue to reduce incoming damage once per round.
Undead Thralls: Additional Undead is a Necromancy School Wizard passive feature that allows you to raise additional undead when you cast the Animate Dead spell.
Undead Thralls: Animate Dead is a Necromancy School Wizard passive feature that grants you the spell Animate Dead.
Undead Thralls: Better Summons is a Necromancy School Wizard passive feature that enhances the undead you raise with Animate Dead. They gain additional hit points and extra damage.

The Underdark is a region in Act One of Baldur's Gate 3. It is a vast series of caverns and tunnels devoid of sunlight but full of dangerous creatures and even more dangerous mushrooms. It also contains a multitude of alchemical ingredients that are hard to find elsewhere. “ Ah, cries for help... I must be home. „ — Player character belonging to an Underdark race, upon hearing Baelen's wails
Unstable Backlash is a Wild Magic Barbarian passive feature/reaction. While raging, receiving damage triggers the effects of Wild Magic.
Vampiric Touch is a level 3 necromancy spell. It allows spellcasters at melee range to siphon the life force of their target.
Vaprak's Greed is a Giant barbarian passive feature that increases carry weight.
Volley is a Hunter ranger weapon action. This ability allows Hunters to attack every enemy in a large area with a ranged weapon rather than a single target.
Vow of Enmity is an Oath of Vengeance Paladin class action. It allows them to successfully land their attacks more easily.
Wall of Fire is a level 4 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to create a long, fiery barrier, damaging anything in the area.
Wall of Stone is a level 5 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to create a solid stone barrier.

War God's Blessing is a Reaction available to War Domain clerics. This ability allows these Clerics to grant their ally a +10 to an Attack Roll at the cost of one Channel Divinity Charge. This does not cost a Reaction to use. War Domain Clerics get Guided Strike at an earlier level for themselves; War God's Blessing is a variation of Guided Strike for their allies.
War Magic is an Eldritch Knight Fighter passive feature. This allows the Fighter to make an attack after using a Cantrip by using a Bonus Action.
Warding Bond is a level 2 abjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to bolster an ally's defenses while also sharing any damage they receive.
Water Whip is an action that allows a Way of the Four Elements monk to either knock a target prone, or pull it closer.
Weapon Bond is an Eldritch Knight class action. This prevents the Fighter's main hand weapon from being disarmed and makes it automatically return to the Fighter when thrown.

Web is a level 2 conjuration spell. It allows spellcasters to conjure a mass of sticky and flammable web at an area within range. Creatures moving or entering this area have their speed halved and can become caught in the web.
Whirlwind Attack is a Hunter ranger class action. This ability allows Hunters to attack every enemy around them with a melee attack rather than a single target.
Wholeness of Body is a class action unique to the Way of the Open Hand Monk that lets the monk heal, regain Ki Points, and have an extra bonus action.
Wild Magic is one of the subclasses of barbarian. These barbarians manifest otherworldy magic to bolster their martial abilities.
Wild Shape: Air Myrmidon is a Combat Wild Shape form available to Circle of the Moon Druids.
Wild Shape: Earth Myrmidon is a Combat Wild Shape form available to Circle of the Moon Druids.
Wild Shape: Fire Myrmidon is a Combat Wild Shape form available to Circle of the Moon Druids.
Wild Shape: Sabre-Toothed Tiger is a Combat Wild Shape form available to Circle of the Moon Druids.
Wild Shape: Water Myrmidon is a Combat Wild Shape form available to Circle of the Moon Druids.
Wild Strike is a Druid passive feature that lets you make multiple unarmed attacks while Wildshaped.

Wolf Companion is a variant of Ranger's Companion which is a Subclass Feature of Rangers learned immediately upon choosing the Beast Master subclass. This ability allows the Beast Master to call upon their animal companion to fight and aid them in combat.

Wolf Spider Companion is a variant of Ranger's Companion which is a Subclass Feature of Rangers learned immediately upon choosing the Beast Master subclass. This ability allows the Beast Master to call upon their animal companion to fight and aid them in combat.
Wrathful Smite is a level 1 evocation spell. It allows spellcasters to channel their wrath through their melee weapon, possibly Frightening their target on hit.

Writhing Tide is a class action available to Swarmkeepers which lets them use their swarm to fly a short distance and hover to avoid ground-based hazards. This state lasts for 10 turns during which the Swarmkeeper can reuse this ability each turn without consuming additional resources.
